response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with roughly 17 years of experience and genuine breadth across web, embedded, and infrastructure domains, but the role demands a director-level AI strategy thought leader with recognized industry expertise in AI and cloud platforms. His AI exposure is recent and narrow — MCP tooling and agentic workflow support at re:cinq for roughly six months — and there is no evidence of strategic advisory work, large-scale AI product ownership, cloud platform expertise, or the external recognition (publications, keynotes, industry influence) the role implicitly requires. The current career gap and seniority ceiling at staff/senior level further widen the mismatch.
strengths: 17 years of continuous hands-on engineering across diverse stacks and domains satisfies the minimum experience threshold
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and the ability to own a product end-to-end within a larger ecosystem
Early AI-adjacent work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic infrastructure) shows willingness to engage with the AI tooling space
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI strategy, cloud platform architecture, or advisory roles at scale — core to the principal/director-level mandate
Current career gap since October 2025 and no history of progression beyond staff/senior IC; the role expects director-level organizational influence
No advanced degree in AI or related field, no published work, and no recognized industry presence in AI or cloud — all listed as preferred qualifiers
